title: 9 Signs a Godly Man Still Isn't Running His Own Life
caption:
9 signs a godly man still isn't running his own life.

Checking the phone before your eyes are open. Saying yes because no felt awkward. Skipping the workout you know matters for a scroll you won't remember tomorrow. None of that is a personality. It's an impulse that's louder than you are in the moment it matters.

Galatians 5:16 says walk by the Spirit and you won't gratify the desires of the flesh. Not manage them. Not negotiate with them. Walk somewhere else.

You don't fix years of habit in one plan. You fix it one impulse at a time, starting with the next one that shows up today.

#faith #selfcontrol #christianmen #manofgod #discipline #galatians
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
